name: Buttery Onion Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 ¾ cups shredded mozzarella cheese (6-8 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté onions in margarine over low heat until tender and transparent, about 20-30 minutes.
2. Blend in flour.
3. Gradually add broth and milk; cook and stir until bubbly.
4. Cook and stir for an additional minute; reduce heat to low.
5. Add mozzarella cheese and stir constantly until melted (do not boil).
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve with croutons if desired. Yield: 6 servings (about 1 ½ quarts).
